text: vayehi acharey movt moshe 'eved yehva vayomer yehva el-yehovshu'a bin-nun mesharet moshe lemor
moshe 'avedi met ve'ata qum 'avor et-hayareden haze ata vekhal-ha'am haze el-haarets asher anokhi noten lahem liveney yiserael
kal-maqovm asher tiderokh kaf-ragelekhem bov lakhem netativ kaasher dibareti el-moshe
mehamidebar vehalevanovn haze ve'ad-hanahar hagadovl nehar-perat kol erets hachitim ve'ad-hayam hagadovl mevov hashamesh yiheye gevulekhem
lo-yiteyatsev ish lefaneykha kol yemey chayeykha kaasher hayiti 'im-moshe eheye 'imakh lo arepekha velo e'ezeveka
chazaq veemats ki ata tanechil et-ha'am haze et-haarets asher-nisheba'eti laavovtam latet lahem
raq chazaq veemats meod lishemor la'asovt kekhal-hatovra asher tsivekha moshe 'avedi al-tasur mimenu yamin usemovl lema'an tasekil bekhol asher telekh
lo-yamush sefer hatovra haze mipikha vehagita bov yovmam valayela lema'an tishemor la'asovt kekhal-hakatuv bov ki-az tatselicha et-derakhekha veaz tasekil
halov tsivitikha chazaq veemats al-ta'arots veal-techat ki 'imekha yehva eloheykha bekhol asher telekh f
vayetsav yehovshu'a et-shoterey ha'am lemor

'iveru ׀ beqerev hamachane vetsauu et-ha'am lemor hakhinu lakhem tseyda ki be'ovd ׀ sheloshet yamim atem 'overim et-hayareden haze lavov lareshet et-haarets asher yehva eloheykhem noten lakhem lerishetah s
velaruveni velagadi velachatsi shevet hamenashe amar yehovshu'a lemor
zakhovr et-hadavar asher tsiva etekhem moshe 'eved-yehva lemor yehva eloheykhem menicha lakhem venatan lakhem et-haarets hazot
nesheykhem tapekhem umiqeneykhem yeshevu baarets asher natan lakhem moshe be'ever hayareden veatem ta'averu chamushim lifeney acheykhem kol gibovrey hachayil va'azaretem ovtam

'ad asher-yanicha yehva ׀ laacheykhem kakhem veyareshu gam-hema et-haarets asher-yehva eloheykhem noten lahem veshavetem leerets yerushatekhem virishetem ovtah asher ׀ natan lakhem moshe 'eved yehva be'ever hayareden mizerach hashamesh
vaya'anu et-yehovshu'a lemor kol asher-tsivitanu na'ase veel-kal-asher tishelachenu nelekh
kekhol asher-shama'enu el-moshe ken nishema' eleykha raq yiheye yehva eloheykha 'imakh kaasher haya 'im-moshe
kal-ish asher-yamere et-pikha velo-yishema' et-devareykha lekhol asher-tetsavenu yumat raq chazaq veemats f
vayishelach yehovshu'a-bin-nun min-hashitim shenayim-anashim meragelim cheresh lemor lekhu reu et-haarets veet-yerichov vayelekhu vayavou beyt-isha zovna ushemah rachav vayishekevu-shama
vayeamar lemelekh yerichov lemor hine anashim bau hena halayela mibeney yiserael lachepor et-haarets
vayishelach melekh yerichov el-rachav lemor hovtsii haanashim habaim elayikh asher-bau leveytekh ki lachepor et-kal-haarets bau
vatiqach haisha et-sheney haanashim vatitsepenov vatomer ׀ ken bau elay haanashim velo yada'eti meayin hema
vayehi hasha'ar lisegovr bachoshekh vehaanashim yatsau lo yada'eti ana halekhu haanashim ridefu maher achareyhem ki tasigum
vehi he'elatam hagaga vatitemenem befishetey ha'ets ha'arukhovt lah 'al-hagag
vehaanashim radefu achareyhem derekh hayareden 'al hama'eberovt vehasha'ar sagaru acharey kaasher yatseu harodefim achareyhem
vehema terem yishekavun vehi 'aleta 'aleyhem 'al-hagag
vatomer el-haanashim yada'eti ki-natan yehva lakhem et-haarets vekhi-nafela eymatekhem 'aleynu vekhi namogu kal-yoshevey haarets mipeneykhem
ki shama'enu et asher-hovvish yehva et-mey yam-suf mipeneykhem betsetekhem mimitserayim vaasher 'asitem lisheney malekhey haemori asher be'ever hayareden lesichon ule'ovg asher hecherametem ovtam
vanishema' vayimas levavenu velo-qama 'ovd rucha beish mipeneykhem ki yehva eloheykhem hu elohim bashamayim mima'al ve'al-haarets mitachat
ve'ata hishave'u-na li bayhva ki-'asiti 'imakhem chased va'asitem gam-atem 'im-beyt avi chesed unetatem li ovt emet
vehachayitem et-avi veet-imi veet-achay veet achovtay kh acheyovtay q veet kal-asher lahem vehitsaletem et-nafeshoteynu mimavet
vayomeru lah haanashim nafeshenu tacheteykhem lamut im lo tagidu et-devarenu ze vehaya betet-yehva lanu et-haarets ve'asinu 'imakh chesed veemet
vatovridem bachevel be'ad hachalovn ki veytah beqir hachovma uvachovma hi yovshavet
vatomer lahem hahara lekhu pen-yifege'u vakhem harodefim venachebetem shama sheloshet yamim 'ad shovv harodefim veachar telekhu ledarekekhem
vayomeru eleyha haanashim neqiyim anachenu mishevu'atekh haze asher hisheba'etanu
hine anachenu vaim baarets et-tiqevat chut hashani haze tiqesheri bachalovn asher hovradetenu vov veet-avikh veet-imekh veet-achayikh veet kal-beyt avikh taasefi elayikh habayeta
vehaya kol asher-yetse midaletey veytekh ׀ hachutsa damov veroshov vaanachenu neqiyim vekhol asher yiheye itakh babayit damov veroshenu im-yad tiheyeh-bov
veim-tagidi et-devarenu ze vehayinu neqiyim mishevu'atekh asher hisheba'etanu
vatomer kedivereykhem ken-hu vateshalechem vayelekhu vatiqeshor et-tiqevat hashani bachalovn
vayelekhu vayavou hahara vayeshevu sham sheloshet yamim 'ad-shavu harodefim vayevaqeshu harodefim bekhal-haderekh velo matsau
vayashuvu sheney haanashim vayeredu mehahar vaya'averu vayavou el-yehovshu'a bin-nun vayesaperu-lov et kal-hamotseovt ovtam
vayomeru el-yehovshu'a ki-natan yehva beyadenu et-kal-haarets vegam-namogu kal-yoshevey haarets mipaneynu s
vayashekem yehovshu'a baboqer vayise'u mehashitim vayavou 'ad-hayareden hu vekhal-beney yiserael vayalinu sham terem ya'avoru
vayehi miqetse sheloshet yamim vaya'averu hashoterim beqerev hamachane
vayetsauu et-ha'am lemor kireovtekhem et arovn berit-yehva eloheykhem vehakohanim haleviyim noseim otov veatem tise'u mimeqovmekhem vahalakhetem acharayv
akh ׀ rachovq yiheye beyneykhem uveynov kh uveynayv q kealepayim ama bamida al-tiqerevu elayv lema'an asher-tede'u et-haderekh asher telekhu-vah ki lo 'avaretem baderekh mitemovl shileshovm s
vayomer yehovshu'a el-ha'am hiteqadashu ki machar ya'ase yehva beqirebekhem nifelaovt
vayomer yehovshu'a el-hakohanim lemor seu et-arovn haberit ve'iveru lifeney ha'am vayiseu et-arovn haberit vayelekhu lifeney ha'am s
vayomer yehva el-yehovshu'a hayovm haze achel gadelekha be'eyney kal-yiserael asher yede'un ki kaasher hayiti 'im-moshe eheye 'imakh
veata tetsave et-hakohanim noseey arovn-haberit lemor kevoakhem 'ad-qetse mey hayareden bayareden ta'amodu f
vayomer yehovshu'a el-beney yiserael goshu hena veshime'u et-diverey yehva eloheykhem
vayomer yehovshu'a bezot tede'un ki el chay beqirebekhem vehovresh yovrish mipeneykhem et-hakena'ani veet-hachiti veet-hachivi veet-haperizi veet-hagiregashi vehaemori vehayevusi
hine arovn haberit adovn kal-haarets 'over lifeneykhem bayareden
ve'ata qechu lakhem sheney 'asar ish mishivetey yiserael ish-echad ish-echad lashavet
vehaya kenovcha kapovt rageley hakohanim noseey arovn yehva adovn kal-haarets bemey hayareden mey hayareden yikaretun hamayim hayoredim milema'ela veya'amedu ned echad
vayehi bineso'a ha'am meaholeyhem la'avor et-hayareden vehakohanim noseey haarovn haberit lifeney ha'am
ukhevov noseey haarovn 'ad-hayareden verageley hakohanim noseey haarovn nitebelu biqetse hamayim vehayareden male 'al-kal-gedovtayv kol yemey qatsir

vaya'amedu hamayim hayoredim milema'ela qamu ned-echad harecheq meod vaadam kh meadam q ha'ir asher mitsad tsaretan vehayoredim 'al yam ha'arava yam-hamelach tamu nikheratu veha'am 'averu neged yerichov
vaya'amedu hakohanim noseey haarovn berit-yehva becharava betovkh hayareden hakhen vekhal-yiserael 'overim becharava 'ad asher-tamu kal-hagovy la'avor et-hayareden
vayehi kaasher-tamu khal-hagovy la'avovr et-hayareden f vayomer yehva el-yehovshu'a lemor
qechu lakhem min-ha'am sheneym 'asar anashim ish-echad ish-echad mishavet
vetsauu ovtam lemor seu-lakhem mize mitovkh hayareden mimatsav rageley hakohanim hakhin sheteym-'esere avanim veha'avaretem ovtam 'imakhem vehinachetem ovtam bamalovn asher-talinu vov halayela s
vayiqera yehovshu'a el-sheneym he'asar ish asher hekhin mibeney yiserael ish-echad ish-echad mishavet
vayomer lahem yehovshu'a 'iveru lifeney arovn yehva eloheykhem el-tovkh hayareden veharimu lakhem ish even achat 'al-shikhemov lemisepar shivetey veney-yiserael
lema'an tiheye zot ovt beqirebekhem ki-yishealun beneykhem machar lemor ma haavanim haele lakhem
vaamaretem lahem asher nikheretu meymey hayareden mipeney arovn berit-yehva be'averov bayareden nikheretu mey hayareden vehayu haavanim haele lezikarovn liveney yiserael 'ad-'ovlam

vaya'asu-khen beney-yiserael kaasher tsiva yehovshu'a vayiseu shetey-'esere avanim mitovkh hayareden kaasher diber yehva el-yehovshu'a lemisepar shivetey veney-yiserael vaya'avirum 'imam el-hamalovn vayanichum sham
usheteym 'esere avanim heqim yehovshu'a betovkh hayareden tachat matsav rageley hakohanim noseey arovn haberit vayiheyu sham 'ad hayovm haze
vehakohanim noseey haarovn 'omedim betovkh hayareden 'ad tom kal-hadavar asher-tsiva yehva et-yehovshu'a ledaber el-ha'am kekhol asher-tsiva moshe et-yehovshu'a vayemaharu ha'am vaya'avoru
vayehi kaasher-tam kal-ha'am la'avovr vaya'avor arovn-yehva vehakohanim lifeney ha'am
vaya'averu beney-reuven uveney-gad vachatsi shevet hamenashe chamushim lifeney beney yiserael kaasher diber aleyhem moshe
keareba'im elef chalutsey hatsava 'averu lifeney yehva lamilechama el 'arevovt yerichov s

tsave et-hakohanim noseey arovn ha'edut veya'alu min-hayareden
vayetsav yehovshu'a et-hakohanim lemor 'alu min-hayareden

vayehi ba'alovt kh ka'alovt q hakohanim noseey arovn berit-yehva mitovkh hayareden nitequ kapovt rageley hakohanim el hecharava vayashuvu mey-hayareden limeqovmam vayelekhu khitemovl-shileshovm 'al-kal-gedovtayv
veha'am 'alu min-hayareden be'asovr lachodesh harishovn vayachanu bagilegal biqetse mizerach yerichov
veet sheteym 'esere haavanim haele asher laqechu min-hayareden heqim yehovshu'a bagilegal
vayomer el-beney yiserael lemor asher yishealun beneykhem machar et-avovtam lemor ma haavanim haele
vehovda'etem et-beneykhem lemor bayabasha 'avar yiserael et-hayareden haze
asher-hovvish yehva eloheykhem et-mey hayareden mipeneykhem 'ad-'averekhem kaasher 'asa yehva eloheykhem leyam-suf asher-hovvish mipaneynu 'ad-'averenu
lema'an da'at kal-'amey haarets et-yad yehva ki chazaqa hi lema'an yeratem et-yehva eloheykhem kal-hayamim s

vayehi khishemo'a kal-malekhey haemori asher be'ever hayareden yama vekhal-malekhey hakena'ani asher 'al-hayam et asher-hovvish yehva et-mey hayareden mipeney veney-yiserael 'ad 'averanu kh 'averam q vayimas levavam velo-haya vam 'ovd rucha mipeney beney-yiserael s
ba'et hahi amar yehva el-yehovshu'a 'ase lekha charevovt tsurim veshuv mol et-beney-yiserael shenit
vaya'as-lov yehovshu'a charevovt tsurim vayamal et-beney yiserael el-give'at ha'aralovt
veze hadavar asher-mal yehovshu'a kal-ha'am hayotse mimitserayim hazekharim kol ׀ aneshey hamilechama metu vamidebar baderekh betsetam mimitserayim
ki-mulim hayu kal-ha'am hayotseim vekhal-ha'am hayilodim bamidebar baderekh betsetam mimitserayim lo-malu

ki ׀ areba'im shana halekhu veney-yiserael bamidebar 'ad-tom kal-hagovy aneshey hamilechama hayotseim mimitserayim asher lo-shame'u beqovl yehva asher nisheba' yehva lahem levileti hareovtam et-haarets asher nisheba' yehva laavovtam latet lanu erets zavat chalav udevash

vayehi kaasher-tamu khal-hagovy lehimovl vayeshevu tachetam bamachane 'ad chayovtam f

vayishebot haman mimachorat beakhelam me'avur haarets velo-haya 'ovd liveney yiserael man vayokhelu mitevuat erets kena'an bashana hahi s

vayasev arovn-yehva et-ha'ir haqef pa'am echat vayavou hamachane vayalinu bamachane f

veshive'a hakohanim noseim shive'a shovferovt hayovelim lifeney arovn yehva holekhim halovkh vetaqe'u bashovfarovt vehechaluts holekh lifeneyhem vehameasef holekh acharey arovn yehva hovlekh kh halovkh q vetaqov'a bashovfarovt
vayasobu et-ha'ir bayovm hasheni pa'am achat vayashuvu hamachane ko 'asu sheshet yamim
vayehi ׀ bayovm hashevi'i vayashekimu ka'alovt hashachar vayasobu et-ha'ir kamishepat haze sheva' pe'amim raq bayovm hahu savevu et-ha'ir sheva' pe'amim
vayehi bapa'am hashevi'it taqe'u hakohanim bashovfarovt vayomer yehovshu'a el-ha'am hari'u ki-natan yehva lakhem et-ha'ir
vehayeta ha'ir cherem hi vekhal-asher-bah layhva raq rachav hazovna ticheye hi vekhal-asher itah babayit ki hechebeata et-hamaleakhim asher shalachenu
veraq-atem shimeru min-hacherem pen-tacharimu uleqachetem min-hacherem vesametem et-machane yiserael lecherem va'akharetem ovtov
vekhol ׀ kesef vezahav ukheley nechoshet uvarezel qodesh hu layhva ovtsar yehva yavov
vayara' ha'am vayiteqe'u bashofarovt vayehi khishemo'a ha'am et-qovl hashovfar vayari'u ha'am teru'a gedovla vatipol hachovma tacheteyha vaya'al ha'am ha'ira ish negedov vayilekedu et-ha'ir
vayacharimu et-kal-asher ba'ir meish ve'ad-isha mina'ar ve'ad-zaqen ve'ad shovr vase vachamovr lefi-charev
velishenayim haanashim hameragelim et-haarets amar yehovshu'a bou beyt-haisha hazovna vehovtsiu misham et-haisha veet-kal-asher-lah kaasher nisheba'etem lah
vayavou hane'arim hameragelim vayotsiu et-rachav veet-aviha veet-imah veet-acheyha veet-kal-asher-lah veet kal-mishepechovteyha hovtsiu vayanichum michuts lemachane yiserael
veha'ir sarefu vaesh vekhal-asher-bah raq ׀ hakesef vehazahav ukheley hanechoshet vehabarezel natenu ovtsar beyt-yehva
veet-rachav hazovna veet-beyt aviha veet-kal-asher-lah hecheya yehovshu'a vateshev beqerev yiserael 'ad hayovm haze ki hechebia et-hamaleakhim asher-shalach yehovshu'a leragel et-yerichov f
vayasheba' yehovshu'a ba'et hahi lemor arur haish lifeney yehva asher yaqum uvana et-ha'ir hazot et-yerichov bivekhorov yeyasedena uvitse'irov yatsiv delateyha
vayehi yehva et-yehovshu'a vayehi shame'ov bekhal-haarets
vayime'alu veney-yiserael ma'al bacherem vayiqach 'akhan ben-karemi ven-zavedi ven-zerach lemate yehuda min-hacherem vayichar-af yehva biveney yiserael
vayishelach yehovshu'a anashim mirichov ha'ay asher 'im-beyt aven miqedem leveyt-el vayomer aleyhem lemor 'alu veragelu et-haarets vaya'alu haanashim vayeragelu et-ha'ay
vayashuvu el-yehovshu'a vayomeru elayv al-ya'al kal-ha'am kealepayim ish ov kisheloshet alafim ish ya'alu veyaku et-ha'ay al-teyaga'-shama et-kal-ha'am ki me'at hema
vaya'alu min-ha'am shama kisheloshet alafim ish vayanusu lifeney aneshey ha'ay
vayaku mehem aneshey ha'ay kisheloshim veshisha ish vayiredefum lifeney hasha'ar 'ad-hashevarim vayakum bamovrad vayimas levav-ha'am vayehi lemayim
vayiqera' yehovshu'a simelotayv vayipol 'al-panayv aretsa lifeney arovn yehva 'ad-ha'erev hu veziqeney yiserael vaya'alu 'afar 'al-rosham
vayomer yehovshu'a ahah ׀ adonay yehvi lama he'avareta ha'avir et-ha'am haze et-hayareden latet otanu beyad haemori lehaavidenu velu hovalenu vaneshev be'ever hayareden
bi adonay ma omar acharey asher hafakh yiserael 'oref lifeney oyevayv
veyisheme'u hakena'ani vekhol yoshevey haarets venasabu 'aleynu vehikheritu et-shemenu min-haarets umah-ta'ase leshimekha hagadovl s
vayomer yehva el-yehovshu'a qum lakh lama ze ata nofel 'al-paneykha
chata yiserael vegam 'averu et-beriti asher tsiviti ovtam vegam laqechu min-hacherem vegam ganevu vegam kichashu vegam samu vikheleyhem
velo yukhelu beney yiserael laqum lifeney oyeveyhem 'oref yifenu lifeney oyeveyhem ki hayu lecherem lo ovsif liheyovt 'imakhem im-lo tashemidu hacherem miqirebekhem
qum qadesh et-ha'am veamareta hiteqadeshu lemachar ki kho amar yehva elohey yiserael cherem beqirebekha yiserael lo tukhal laqum lifeney oyeveykha 'ad-hasirekhem hacherem miqirebekhem

veniqeravetem baboqer leshiveteykhem vehaya hashevet asher-yilekedenu yehva yiqerav lamishepachovt vehamishepacha asher-yilekedena yehva tiqerav labatim vehabayit asher yilekedenu yehva yiqerav lagevarim

vayomer yehva el-yehovshu'a al-tira veal-techat qach 'imekha et kal-'am hamilechama vequm 'ale ha'ay ree ׀ natati veyadekha et-melekh ha'ay veet-'amov veet-'irov veet-aretsov
